title: [I18N]DO you need translation for Chinese ,i can help you.

comments.body: I think it hard to maintain translation for a opensource project.  It alway outdated and inaccurate  over time, especially the code team can't  deal with it.

> I think it hard to maintain translation for a opensource project.  It alway outdated and inaccurate  over time, especially the code team can't  deal with it.

我挺喜欢这个项目的，所以想翻译个`readme.md`这个文档，与时俱进应该不难，而不是去翻译整个程序，另外，官网是我的下一个目标，程序的话应该我不去动的，有一点帮助是一点帮助吧。
Fedora project and other distros support translations, So it would be better to work there.
